evidence.title: UN Syria remarks: UN says Israel action violated 1974 disengagement agreement
evidence.source_description: United Nations India page containing Syria press remarks by UN Special Envoy context, retrieved via web on 2026-06-29; faithful excerpt of relevant lines.
evidence.relevance: Official UN-hosted statement that UN message from New York was that the observed Israeli action was a violation of the 1974 disengagement agreement; corroborates UN official confirmation/adverse context.

evidence.title: AP spotlight: Israel advances on Syrian buffer zone, Dec. 2024
evidence.source_description: Associated Press spotlight/article retrieved via web on 2026-06-29; faithful excerpt of relevant text.
evidence.relevance: Corroborates commencement timing immediately after Assad's fall, Israeli movement into the buffer zone, Syrian side of Mount Hermon geography, and Israel's 'targeted and temporary control' framing.

evidence.title: AP report: Netanyahu says Israeli troops will occupy buffer zone inside Syria for foreseeable future
evidence.source_description: Associated Press article retrieved via web on 2026-06-29; faithful excerpt of relevant text and metadata from rendered page.
evidence.relevance: Corroborates December 17, 2024 Israeli presence on the summit of Mount Hermon inside Syria, describes the seized buffer zone, quotes Netanyahu's intent to stay until a security arrangement, and records UN spokesman's view that the advance violates the buffer-zone agreement.

evidence.title: Reuters/Arab News: Israel says sterile defense zone in southern Syria would have no permanent Israeli presence
evidence.source_description: Arab News page carrying Reuters article, opened and read via web on 2026-06-29; faithful excerpts from rendered lines 156-205.
evidence.relevance: Defense-context source on Israeli intent and scope: Defense Minister Katz described a sterile defense zone without permanent Israeli presence; military spokesperson said IDF was not advancing toward Damascus and had no interest other than protecting borders and citizens, while also acknowledging presence in the demilitarized buffer zone and a few additional points.

evidence.title: UN Security Council transcript S/PV.9857 excerpts on Israeli forces in Syrian separation area
evidence.source_description: United Nations Digital Library PDF transcript of Security Council meeting S/PV.9857, 12 February 2025; faithful text excerpts retrieved via web/PDF text view on 2026-06-29.
evidence.relevance: Official UN and Security Council record confirming IDF positions in the area of separation, violation of the 1974 Disengagement Agreement, and Syrian/P5 descriptions of Israeli crossings and territorial seizure after December 8, 2024.
